The **Belgium national under-18 football team** is a feeder team for the main [Belgium national football team](/wiki/Belgium_national_football_team "Belgium national football team").

The team plays an annual friendly tournament. In addition, it only plays practice matches. The team mainly intends to prepare players from Belgium Under 17 for Belgium Under 19.

From 1948 to 2001, an annual European Under-18 Championship was played. In 1977, Belgium won the tournament. In 2002, the tournament was transformed into a European Under-19 football championship.[[1]](#cite_note-1)
